name: @datanexusmcp/mcp-server
description: DataNexus MCP — AI-Ready access to public data via 29 tools: US/UK nonprofits, OSS vulnerability intelligence, professional licence verification (NPI/FINRA/SAM.gov), domain & DNS intelligence, global patent data (EPO/USPTO), government contracting (USASpending/SAM.gov/EU TED), and regulatory dockets (Regulations.gov/Federal Register). No API key required for most tools.
